description: Cause matrix 04: single_lane_bottleneck tested on tunnel ratio 50% with 35 agents.
hypothesis: Longer corridors should increase abstraction repair length; more agents per corridor node should increase waits and conflict handling.
name: matrix_c04_r50_w80_h23_a35_s01
target_failure_hypothesis: Tunnel capacity is one robot per time step, but bottleneck load is high.
